mapper.select:
SELECT ID HQ_DATA_ID TALLY_ID UPDATE_INFO CREATE_BY CREATE_BY_NAME CREATE_TIME FROM M_HQ_DATA_LOG
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_HQ_DATA_LOG(ID, HQ_DATA_ID, TALLY_ID, UPDATE_INFO, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hqDataId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tallyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_HQ_DATA_LOG SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HQ_DATA_ID = #{hqDataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TALLY_ID = #{tallyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_INFO = #{updateInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
